creator: royger@freebsd.org
text:
FWIW, it *seems* like this issue could also be related to the Dom0 kernel version, see:

http://lists.xenproject.org/archives/html/xen-devel/2016-02/msg02205.html

From the first reply, it seems to suggest that the Dom0 kernel version must be >= 3.11. Do you know which version of the Linux kernel your XenServer runs?
